messages.content: You are an expert Python programmer.

from typing import List


def parse_music(music_string: str) -> List[int]:
    \"\"\" A string depicting musical notes in an ASCII format is passed to this function. It needs to be parsed to yield a list of integers that correspond to the beat length of each note.

    Here is a legend:
    'o' - whole note, lasts four beats
    'o|' - half note, lasts two beats
    '.|' - quater note, lasts one beat

    >>> parse_music('o o| .| o| o| .| .| .| .| o o')
    [4, 2, 1, 2, 2, 1, 1, 1, 1, 4, 4]
    \"\"\"

Complete the function body above. Return a JSON object with no markdown fences:
{
  "code": "<function body only — lines after the closing docstring quote, correctly indented>",
  "confidence": <float from 0.0 to 1.0>
}
